ops.body: Verified: cc-notes local pack (--hooks plugin/hooks) passes 80/80 inline tests, 0 failures, inside this live MCP session (markers .git/cc-notes/mcp/13713|43499|94011.json present). '60/60' was the authoring-time count; pack grew to 80, all green under the marker. Fix merged to main cdf40e1d, CI green. A non-isolated capt-hook test still shows 5 reds from STALE cached release packs (cc-notes@42a5a3cc/@4424c70/@9e8fb84 = old shipped code); machine-local cache artifact, heals on the next release tag, not a local-pack failure.
